# Story: administer jobs

The behavior is specified in `features/job-management.feature` · 'View job schedules'.
Deletion: see `features/job-management.feature` · "Delete job schedule".
The whole feature file `features/job-management.feature` also gets a file-level citation.

```md
An illustrative citation in a fence must not count:
`features/does-not-exist.feature` · 'Nope'
```
